ApiBaseUrl.Name: API Base URL
ApiBaseUrl.Hint: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible API. DeepSeek: https://api.deepseek.com/v1 — OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1 — OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 — Ollama (local): http://localhost:11434/v1

ApiKey.Name: API Key
ApiKey.Hint: Your API key for the provider above. Stored in this world's settings and visible to other GMs of this world.

Model.Name: Model
Model.Hint: Model identifier, e.g. deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner, gpt-4o, or any model your provider offers.

Temperature.Name: Creativity (temperature)
Temperature.Hint: Higher values give more creative (and less predictable) concepts.

MaxTokens.Name: Max response tokens
MaxTokens.Hint: Upper limit for the AI response length. Reasoning models (like DeepSeek's) spend part of this budget thinking before they write, so keep it generous — raise it if you see truncation errors.

RequestTimeout.Name: Request timeout (seconds)
RequestTimeout.Hint: Abort a generation if the AI provider sends no data for this long. Responses are streamed, so slow models keep working as long as data keeps arriving — this only catches genuinely stalled connections.

Generator.Title: SimplyPF2e
Generator.RandomTooltip: Random creature: ignores the description and invents something at this level. Every click rolls a new surprise.
Generator.RandomEncounterTooltip: Random encounter: ignores the theme and invents a new one at this party level. Every click rolls a new surprise.
Generator.EncounterTheme: Encounter theme (optional — leave blank for a surprise)
Generator.EncounterThemePlaceholder: e.g. A smuggler ring run by wererats beneath the fish market...
Generator.CharacterPromptPlaceholder: e.g. A gruff dwarven artillerist who left the family forge to hunt the beast that killed her mentor...
Generator.TreasureReadoutTooltip: Total loot value across all members vs. the treasure budget (per-creature budget × count, from the GM Core Treasure by Level table)
Generator.RerollLootTooltip: Generate different loot without changing the creature
Generator.NoApiKey: No API key is configured. Set one in Module Settings → SimplyPF2e before generating.

Presets.SaveTooltip: Save a custom preset (edits the selected custom preset in place)
Presets.DuplicateTooltip: Duplicate the selected preset into a new custom preset
Presets.DialogNamePlaceholder: e.g. Gunslinger, Swamp Witch, Undead Brute
Presets.DialogGuidancePlaceholder: e.g. Build like a gunslinger: a ranged duelist with extreme attack, a jam-prone firearm strike with fatal d10, low HP, high Reflex, and a quick-draw signature ability. No spellcasting.
Presets.DeleteConfirm: Delete the custom preset "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
Presets.ManageEmpty: No custom presets yet. Save one from the generator window.

Progress.Thinking: {step}: the model is thinking… (~{tokens} tokens of reasoning)

Tokens.Heading: Token usage
Tokens.StepEstimated: ≈ {total} tokens (the provider sent no usage data)

Sources.MenuHint: Choose which compendium packs SimplyPF2e draws abilities, spells, feats, and equipment from.
Sources.Title: Compendium Sources
Sources.Hint: The Forge scanned this world's Item compendiums. Check the packs each category may draw from — homebrew and module packs work too. Leaving a category empty uses the PF2e system defaults.
Sources.NonePacksFound: No compendium packs with matching content were found in this world.
Sources.ResetDone: Compendium sources reset to the PF2e system defaults.

Preview.FromCompendium: Pulled from the PF2e bestiary ability glossary
Preview.NotFound: No compendium match found — this entry will be skipped
Preview.EquipmentCustom: No compendium match found — this will be created as a custom gear item at the AI's estimated price
Preview.LootCustom: No compendium match found — this will be created as a custom treasure item at the AI's estimated value

ItemForge.Title: SimplyPF2e Item Forge
ItemForge.PromptPlaceholder: e.g. A charred iron circlet that shields the wearer's mind and lets them see in the dark...
ItemForge.NoEffects: No usable passive effects survived validation — the item will be created as flavor-only. Regenerate for a mechanical version.
ItemForge.Created: Created item "{name}". Drag it from the Items directory onto a character sheet.
ItemForge.NoExemplars: No rule exemplars could be harvested from this world's compendiums — is the PF2e equipment compendium installed?
ItemForge.KindsUnavailable: No published rule exemplar exists in this world's compendiums for: {kinds}. These effect kinds are not offered to the AI.
ItemForge.MacroFailed: The item was created, but its activation macro could not be built — check the console. The item still works as flavor; you can recreate it to retry.
ItemForge.NoBaseItems: No {kind} items were found in this world's compendiums — is the PF2e equipment compendium installed?
ItemForge.NoPotencyAvailable: Item level {level} is too low for a magic {kind} — the +1 potency rune itself requires item level {minLevel}. Raise the item level.

Loot.CustomItem: Generated by SimplyPF2e. No compendium match was found for this item, so it stands in as treasure with an estimated value — replace it with the real item if you have it.

Equipment.CustomItem: Generated by SimplyPF2e. No compendium match was found for this item, so it stands in as plain gear at an estimated price — replace it with the real item if you have it.

Errors.NoBaseUrl: No API base URL is configured in the module settings.
Errors.ApiError: The AI provider returned an error ({status}): {detail}
Errors.NetworkError: Could not reach the AI provider: {message}. If you are using a local or self-hosted provider, make sure it allows requests from Foundry (CORS).
Errors.EmptyResponse: The AI provider returned an empty response. This was retried once already — check the provider's status page and your model name.
Errors.Truncated: The AI ran out of tokens before finishing its answer ({max} allowed). Raise "Max response tokens" in the module settings — reasoning models spend part of the budget thinking before they write.
Errors.Timeout: The AI provider sent no data for {seconds} seconds and the request was aborted. Check the model name and provider status, or raise the timeout in the module settings.
Errors.BadJson: The AI response was not valid JSON. Try generating again.
Errors.WrongSystem: SimplyPF2e requires the Pathfinder Second Edition (pf2e) game system.
